## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss updates and plans for the company's website and product announcements.](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Website updates include new landing pages for workshops, products, home page redesign, about us page, and new tools like transcription and subtitle generators](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Plans to create a conversational AI/voice agent use case page to highlight the upcoming voice agent API product](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Updates on the upcoming Coca-Cola press release and decoupling the enterprise accelerator program announcement](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Discussing leveraging the AI glossary pages for promotion and retargeting high-intent visitors](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

## Topics

### Website Updates

  - [Working on workshop landing page, voice API preview/GA pages](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [New home page redesign with external agency by mid-September](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [New About Us page with overview, history, newsroom](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Adding new tools: YouTube transcription, subtitles generator, AI dictation, sentiment analysis](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Maintenance: new color palette, logos, resource section, header/footer updates](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)

### Conversational AI/Voice Agent Use Case

  - [Plan to create a use case page highlighting the upcoming voice agent API product](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Potentially rebrand as "AI agent" or "voice agent" to avoid overlap with other pages](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [High priority given upcoming announcements and events focused on conversational AI](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

### Product Announcements

  - [Draft press release for Coca-Cola partnership, expecting 30+ day process](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Decouple enterprise accelerator program announcement, launch next week with lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Main agent API announcement likely mid-August, after being in "preview" mode](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

### AI Glossary Promotion

  - [Performing well in search, driving \~300 clicks/day](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Discuss using glossary tags in blog posts to cross-link](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Opportunity to retarget high-intent visitors on key glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)

## Next Steps

  - Patricia to continue website updates based on roadmap

  - [Josh to refine agent API announcement post for mid-August](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Launch enterprise accelerator program page next week](https://fathom.video/share/KVUmJLoka8UD8nHyYTygUprwJKR8cizt?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
